metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p.endswith("RunwayLengthFeet"):
              idx = p.split("Runway")[0]
              return f"has its {idx.lower()} runway {o} feet long"
          if p.endswith("RunwayLengthMetre"):
              idx = p.split("Runway")[0]
              return f"has its {idx.lower()} runway {o} metres long"
          # Fallback
          return f"has {p} {o}"
with:
  if p.endswith("RunwayLengthFeet"):
              idx = p.split("Runway")[0]
              return f"has its {idx.lower()} runway {o} feet long"
          if p.endswith("RunwayLengthMetre"):
              idx = p.split("Runway")[0]
              return f"has its {idx.lower()} runway {o} metres long"
          # New handling for runway surface type variants (e.g., 5thRunwaySurfaceType)
          if p.endswith("RunwaySurfaceType"):
              idx = p.split("Runway")[0]
              return f"has its {idx.lower()} runway surface {o}"
          # New handling for runway number variants (e.g., 1stRunwayNumber)
          if p.endswith("RunwayNumber"):
              idx = p.split("Runway")[0]
              return f"has its {idx.lower()} runway numbered {o}"
          # Fallback
          return f"has {p} {o}"
